title: Auth service key validation delay breaks payment processing
description: Auth service experiences latency in JWKS key fetching, causing payment-service validation to timeout and API gateway to fail.

logs.message: JWKS endpoint latency increased from 120ms to 2800ms
Key validation cache hit rate dropped to 12% due to token rotation frequency
Auth service validation calls timing out: waiting >3000ms for JWKS verification
Request queuing detected: unable to progress transaction validations
POST /charge returned 503: payment-service saturated waiting on auth verification
Email queue processing rate slightly elevated

alerts.message: Auth service latency spike on key validation operations
Payment service error rate elevated with upstream auth timeouts
Notification service queue processing rate increased

ground_truth.correct_fix: Increase JWKS cache TTL and add circuit breaker; kubectl set env deploy/auth-service JWKS_CACHE_TTL=600 JWKS_FETCH_TIMEOUT=500
